name: huggingface
description: HuggingFace integration — search, fetch, deploy, run jobs, query datasets
author: zorai

token.label: HuggingFace Token
token.description: HF user/access token (hf_...). Required for write APIs; optional for read APIs (anonymous = rate-limited).

default_namespace.label: Default namespace
default_namespace.description: Default user or org for endpoints/AutoTrain

search_models.path: https://huggingface.co/api/models?search={{urlencode params.q}}&limit={{default params.limit "20"}}{{#if params.filter}}&filter={{urlencode params.filter}}{{/if}}{{#if params.sort}}&sort={{urlencode params.sort}}{{/if}}

search_datasets.path: https://huggingface.co/api/datasets?search={{urlencode params.q}}&limit={{default params.limit "20"}}{{#if params.filter}}&filter={{urlencode params.filter}}{{/if}}{{#if params.sort}}&sort={{urlencode params.sort}}{{/if}}

search_spaces.path: https://huggingface.co/api/spaces?search={{urlencode params.q}}&limit={{default params.limit "20"}}{{#if params.filter}}&filter={{urlencode params.filter}}{{/if}}{{#if params.sort}}&sort={{urlencode params.sort}}{{/if}}

dataset_search.path: https://datasets-server.huggingface.co/search?dataset={{urlencode params.dataset}}&config={{urlencode params.config}}&split={{urlencode params.split}}&query={{urlencode params.query}}&offset={{default params.offset "0"}}&length={{default params.length "20"}}

dataset_filter.path: https://datasets-server.huggingface.co/filter?dataset={{urlencode params.dataset}}&config={{urlencode params.config}}&split={{urlencode params.split}}&where={{urlencode params.where}}&offset={{default params.offset "0"}}&length={{default params.length "20"}}

submit_async_inference.response_template: Async job submitted: `{{task_id}}`. Poll with `/hf job-status job_id={{task_id}}`.

create_autotrain_project.response_template: **AutoTrain project `{{name}}` created** (id {{id}}). Start a run with `/hf autotrain-start project_id={{id}}`.

start_autotrain_run.response_template: **AutoTrain run started for project {{../params.project_id}}** (this incurs charges). Job id: {{job_id}}.

connector.setup_hint: Run `/hf-tools auth-import` after `huggingface-cli login`, or paste a token from huggingface.co/settings/tokens.

health.description: Verify HuggingFace token and show identity

data-splits.description: List config/split pairs for a dataset

data-size.description: Row + byte counts for a dataset

data-rows.description: Fetch rows from a dataset split

data-filter.description: Apply predicates to a dataset split

data-stats.description: Per-column statistics for a dataset split

data-valid.description: Check which datasets-server features work for a dataset

infer.description: Run serverless inference on a model

endpoint-list.description: List dedicated endpoints in a namespace

endpoint-create.description: Create a dedicated endpoint (pass full HF endpoint JSON in body param; incurs charges)

endpoint-update.description: Update a dedicated endpoint (pass partial HF endpoint JSON in patch param; may incur charges)

autotrain-create.description: Create an AutoTrain project (pass full AutoTrain project JSON in body param)

autotrain-start.description: Start an AutoTrain run (pass training-config JSON in body param; incurs charges)

autotrain-runs.description: List AutoTrain runs for a project
